arts.ttl: Chelsea confident 'excellent relationship' can secure IMPOSSIBLE transfer
arts.sum: The Italian outlet claims that not even Reijnders would be off the market should Milan fail to qualify for the Champions League. Chelsea are interested in Tijjani Reijnders and there is a belief that he could be attainable in the summer, according to Italian media.

arts.ttl: Report: Former Chelsea Champions League winner could join Graham Potter at West Ham, Blues have £68m buy-back clause
arts.sum: Should Chelsea think about re-signing him?

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca happy to have key players back fit for ‘final rush’ of season
arts.sum: The Italian will have Trevoh Chalobah and Benoit Badiashile available for Thursday’s Conference League last-16 game away to Copenhagen,

arts.ttl: Chelsea predicted lineup vs Copenhagen - Conference League
arts.sum: How Chelsea could line up for their Conference League last 16 first leg with Copenhagen.

arts.ttl: Chelsea are about to see a new side to Cole Palmer as Enzo Maresca finds way to unlock his star
arts.sum: Palmer is currently on his worst goalscoring run since joining Chelsea. On a night which had seen Cole Palmer remain deadly serious and glassy-eyed, even he let the situation get the better of him by the end.

arts.ttl: Chelsea set to add seven new players to Enzo Maresca's squad in huge top four boost
arts.sum: After beating Southampton 4-0, and with a full week of rest before the return of Conference League football before another home match against relegation-bound Leicester City, Chelsea are looking up. The condensed nature of the Premier League table means that Enzo Maresca is only two games away from being 10th again, but Stamford Bridge has reason for optimism.

arts.ttl: Ten days that define Chelsea's season, Arsenal statement and the £30m star playing for his future - Bobby Vincent - football.london
arts.sum: Starting from next Thursday, where the west Londoners make the trip to Denmark to take on Copenhagen in the first leg of the UEFA Conference League round of 16, there are four games in the space of 10 days for Maresca and his players to contend with. Playing against the big six teams - consisting of Chelsea themselves, Liverpool, Arsenal, the two Manchester clubs and Tottenham - the Blues have won just one match all season-long; coming away at Spurs in December.

arts.ttl: Former Chelsea and Tottenham boss Jose Mourinho drops new job hint
arts.sum: Former Chelsea and Tottenham boss Jose Mourinho has hinted that he could manage Celtic or Rangers in the future. Mourinho joined Fenerbahce in the summer and has since endured a bumpy ride, having been involved in a number of Turkish football controversies and was accused of racism by Galatasaray after last Monday's goalless draw.

arts.ttl: Every word Enzo Maresca said on Conference League goal, Cole Palmer plan, double injury return
arts.sum: I said a few times already about Robert, it's a matter to give him different kind of games to try and help him. The manager, as I said, it's nice to watch them play, because it's nice football, it will be a tough game."

arts.ttl: Chelsea must be kicking themselves as two former trialists star in Arsenal's 7-1 Champions League victory – opinion
